listings.title: 200 sq.yd JDA Plot, Jagatpura (Sector 20-30)
listings.desc: Overpriced mid-segment residential plot near the flyover extension.

ai_report.recommendation: HOLD. Prices are bloated by speculative flippers; ground water is nearly non-existent, and you'll be at the mercy of the tanker mafia.
ai_report.infra: Metro Phase 2 is a pipe dream that won't see a brick laid for years despite DPR approvals; expect eternal dust from surrounding construction.
ai_report.catalysts: Actual commencement of Metro Phase 2 work at Sitapura end, which is currently just paperwork.
ai_report.civilization: Good schools nearby but internal roads are narrow and will choke as occupancy hits 60%.
ai_report.utilities: Bisalpur connection is a lottery; sewerage systems in newer sectors are frequently back-flowing.

listings.title: 250 sq.yd Plot, Shivdaspura (Land Pooling Zone)
listings.desc: Speculative land in the newly announced JDA pooling scheme area.

ai_report.recommendation: RUN AWAY. Land pooling is a legal quagmire in Jaipur; expect your capital to be locked in litigation for a decade while farmers contest the compensation.
ai_report.infra: Zero. It is currently raw farmland with no electricity or drainage; Ring Road is the only saving grace.
ai_report.catalysts: Resolution of all 5 land pooling legal disputes and actual JDA allotment letters.
ai_report.civilization: Non-existent. You are buying a dream sold by brokers who won't be there in 2 years.
ai_report.utilities: Relying entirely on borewells which are hitting brackish water at 400 feet.

listings.title: 200 sq.yd Plot, Ajmer Road (Near Mahindra SEZ)
listings.desc: Residential plot in a gated township near the commercial hub.

ai_report.recommendation: BUY WITH CAUTION. Only worth it if you work in the SEZ; the commute to main Jaipur is a 45-minute nightmare through 200ft bypass traffic.
ai_report.infra: Manglam’s ₹400cr project adds commercial value, but the service roads are poorly maintained and flood during monsoons.
ai_report.catalysts: Completion of the Elevated Road extensions and 100% occupancy of Smartworks' new managed spaces.
ai_report.civilization: Isolated living; you'll spend a fortune on fuel for basic grocery runs if you aren't in a premium township.
ai_report.utilities: Reasonable electricity, but the water table is dropping faster than anywhere else in the district.

listings.title: 166 sq.yd Plot, Tonk Road (Chokhi Dhani Vicinity)
listings.desc: Prime land near the approved Metro Phase II alignment.

ai_report.recommendation: BUY AND FORGET. This is a long-term play on the Metro; ignore the current noise and hold for the next cycle.
ai_report.infra: Ceigall India’s bid for the Metro project is a positive sign, but expect 5 years of road barricades and extreme noise pollution.
ai_report.catalysts: Physical construction of the Metro pillars and expansion of the Jaipur Exhibition and Convention Centre.
ai_report.civilization: Proximity to industrial areas means air quality is subpar; noise from airport flight paths is constant.
ai_report.utilities: Industrial-grade power available; water is scarce but JDA is prioritizing this corridor for Bisalpur Phase 2.

listings.title: 200 sq.yd Plot, Sikar Road (Dadi Ka Phatak Area)
listings.desc: Affordable residential land in an established, high-density industrial corridor.

ai_report.recommendation: RUN. The area is a logistical mess with heavy trucks 24/7; it is a health hazard for families due to VKI industrial runoff.
ai_report.infra: The roads are permanently damaged by heavy vehicle movement; JDA focus has shifted entirely to the South and West.
ai_report.catalysts: Relocation of the transport hub, which has been 'planned' for 15 years with zero action.
ai_report.civilization: Cramped, noisy, and lack of green spaces. It’s a concrete jungle for the working class, not an investment goldmine.
ai_report.utilities: Decent water availability but the pipelines are ancient and prone to contamination from industrial seepage.
